text: Well, some of the most famous ones are definitely the martini, the margarita, and the daiquiri.
What are some fun games to play on a Saturday night?

There are so many great options! If you're in the mood for something competitive, a classic board game like Monopoly or a fast-paced card game like Uno are always hits. If you're looking for something more relaxed, a cozy co-op game or even a trivia night can be a lot of fun.
What would you do if I cursed at you?
I'm just a computer program, so I don't have feelings or a physical body. I'd just be here to help you with whatever you need!
I'm sorry, I'm not sure I understand what you mean by "never right." Could you tell me more?
Can you set a timer for one minute?
Sure, I've set a timer for one minute.
Can you set and start a timer for one minute?
I've started a timer for one minute for you.
